markschemeHtml:
polar AND unsymmetrical distribution of charge
OR
polar AND dipoles do not cancel
OR
«polar as» dipoles «add to» give a «partial» positive «charge» at P and a «partial» negative «charge» at the opposite/Cl side of the molecule ✔

Accept “polar AND unsymmetrical molecule”.

meta.title: Explain the polarity of PCl3.
breadcrumbLabels: Structure 2. Models of bonding and structure
Structure 2.2.6—Molecular polarity depends on both bond polarity and molecular geometry. Deduce the net dipole moment of a molecule or ion by considering bond polarity and molecular geometry.
